mapper.select:
SELECT VNGL.GATE_CD , VNGL.REG_TYPE , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'M014', VNGL.REG_TYPE, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_TYPE_NM , VNGL.VENDOR_CD , VNGL.VENDOR_NM , VNGL.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM , VNGL.IRS_NO , (VNGL.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DATE , VNGL.INDUSTRY_TYPE , VNGL.BUSINESS_TYPE , VNGL.TEL_NO AS TEL_NO , VNGL.BLOCK_FLAG , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'M044', VNGL.BLOCK_FLAG, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS BLOCK_FLAG_NM , VNGL.BLOCK_REASON FROM STOCVNGL VNGL WHERE VNGL.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VNGL.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND VNGL.PROGRESS_CD = 'E'
AND VNGL.REG_TYPE = #{REG_TYPE}
AND UPPER(VNGL.VENDOR_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(VNGL.GATE_CD, VNGL.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_NM}) '%'
AND VNGL.VENDOR_CD IN ( SELECT VNCM.VENDOR_CD FROM STOCVNCM VNCM WHERE VNCM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VNCM.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND UPPER(VNCM.BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_CD}) '%' )
AND VNGL.VENDOR_CD IN ( SELECT VNCM.VENDOR_CD FROM STOCVNCM VNCM WHERE VNCM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VNCM.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(VNCM.GATE_CD, VNCM.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%' )
AND UPPER(VNGL.CEO_USER_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CEO_USER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(VNGL.IRS_NO) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{IRS_NO}) '%'
AND VNGL.REG_DATE >= (#{REG_FROM_DATE})
AND VNGL.REG_DATE <= (#{REG_TO_DATE})
AND VNGL.BLOCK_FLAG = #{BLOCK_FLAG}

SELECT VNGL.GATE_CD , VNGL.VENDOR_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(VNGL.GATE_CD, VNGL.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , VNGL.VENDOR_ENG_NM , VNGL.REG_TYPE , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'M014', VNGL.REG_TYPE, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_TYPE_NM , VNGL.IRS_NO , VNGL.COMPANY_REG_NO , VNGL.HQ_ZIP_CD AS HQ_ZIP_CD , VNGL.HQ_ADDR_1 AS HQ_ADDR_1 , VNGL.HQ_ADDR_2 AS HQ_ADDR_2 , VNGL.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM , VNGL.BUSINESS_TYPE , VNGL.INDUSTRY_TYPE , (VNGL.FOUNDATION_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS FOUNDATION_DATE , VNGL.TEL_NO AS TEL_NO , VNGL.FAX_NO AS FAX_NO , VNGL.EMAIL AS EMAIL , VNGL.BUSINESS_SIZE , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP039', VNGL.BUSINESS_SIZE, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS BUSINESS_SIZE_NM , VNGL.BUSINESS_DIVISION , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP040', VNGL.BUSINESS_DIVISION, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS BUSINESS_DIVISION_NM , '' AS REGION_CD , VNGL.BUSINESS_REMARK , VNGL.REMARK_TEXT , VNGL.RELAT_YN , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'NH0005', VNGL.RELAT_YN, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS RELAT_YN_NM , VNGL.CORP_TYPE , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'NH0002', VNGL.CORP_TYPE, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS CORP_TYPE_NM
-- 재무정보 , VNFI.FI_YEAR , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'M174', VNFI.FI_YEAR, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS FI_YEAR_NM , VNFI.EVIDENCE_TYPE , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP048', VNFI.EVIDENCE_TYPE, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS EVIDENCE_TYPE_NM , VNFI.OWNER_CAPITAL_AMOUNT , VNFI.TOT_FUND_AMT , VNFI.TOT_LIAB_AMT , VNFI.TOTAL_LIABILITY_RATE , VNFI.CURRENT_ASSET_AMOUNT , VNFI.CURRENT_ASSET_LIABILITY_AMOUNT ,(VNFI.CURRENT_ASSET_AMOUNT / (CASE WHEN (VNFI.CURRENT_ASSET_LIABILITY_AMOUNT,0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE VNFI.CURRENT_ASSET_LIABILITY_AMOUNT END)) * 100 AS CURRENT_ASSET_LIABILITY_RATE , VNFI.SALES_AMOUNT , VNFI.NET_PROFIT_AMOUNT , VNFI.ATT_FILE_NUM AS VNFI_ATT_FILE_NUM , CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(VNFI.GATE_CD, VNFI.ATT_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(VNFI.GATE_CD, VNFI.ATT_FILE_NUM) END AS VNFI_ATT_FILE_NUM_CNT
-- 관리정보 , VNGL.CREDIT_EVAL_COMPANY , VNGL.CREDIT_CD , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP003', VNGL.CREDIT_CD, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS CREDIT_NM , VNGL.EV_ATT_FILE_NUM AS EV_ATT_FILE_NUM , CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(VNGL.GATE_CD, VNGL.EV_ATT_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(VNGL.GATE_CD, VNGL.EV_ATT_FILE_NUM) END AS EV_ATT_FILE_NUM_CNT , VNGL.E_BILL_ASP_TYPE , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP075', VNGL.E_BILL_ASP_TYPE, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS E_BILL_ASP_TYPE_NM , VNGL.TAX_ASP_NM , VNGL.TAX_SEND_TYPE , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP064', VNGL.TAX_SEND_TYPE, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS TAX_SEND_TYPE_NM , VNGL.BLOCK_FLAG , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP006', VNGL.BLOCK_FLAG, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS BLOCK_FLAG_NM , VNGL.BLOCK_REASON , VNGL.PROGRESS_CD , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'M019', VNGL.PROGRESS_CD, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS PROGRESS_NM , VNGL.SIGN_STATUS , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'M019', VNGL.SIGN_STATUS, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS SIGN_STATUS_NM , VNGL.MOD_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(VNGL.GATE_CD, VNGL.MOD_USER_ID , #{ses.langCd}) AS MOD_USER_NM , (VNGL.MOD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS MOD_DATE , DBK.CLIP_GRD AS NICE_DB_GRD , INT.CR_GRD AS KED_GRD , (VNGL.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DATE
-- 결제정보 , VNGL.PAY_CONDITION , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP045', VNGL.PAY_CONDITION, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS PAY_CONDITION_NM , VNGL.PAY_TYPE , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP046', VNGL.PAY_TYPE, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS PAY_TYPE_NM , VNGL.PAY_PUBLIC_TYPE , GETCOMCODE(VNGL.GATE_CD, 'MP047', VNGL.PAY_PUBLIC_TYPE, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS PAY_PUBLIC_TYPE_NM FROM STOCVNGL VNGL LEFT JOIN STOCVNFI VNFI ON (VNFI.GATE_CD = VNGL.GATE_CD AND VNFI.VENDOR_CD = VNGL.VENDOR_CD AND VNFI.FI_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(FI_YEAR) FROM STOCVNFI S WHERE S.GATE_CD = VNFI.GATE_CD AND S.VENDOR_CD = VNFI.VENDOR_CD AND S.DEL_FLAG = '0')) LEFT JOIN DBK_RPT01 DBK ON (VNGL.IRS_NO = DBK.BIZ_NO) LEFT JOIN INTR INT ON (VNGL.IRS_NO = INT.BZNO) WHERE VNGL.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VNGL.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND VNGL.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD}

SELECT VNSL.SL_TYPE , GETCOMCODE(VNSL.GATE_CD, 'NH0006', VNSL.SL_TYPE, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS SL_TYPE_NM , VNSL.SL_NUM , VNSL.SL_NM , VNSL.ISSUE_NM , VNSL.EXPIRY_DATE , VNSL.ATT_FILE_NUM , CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(VNSL.GATE_CD, VNSL.ATT_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(VNSL.GATE_CD, VNSL.ATT_FILE_NUM) END AS ATT_FILE_NUM_CNT FROM STOCVNSL VNSL WHERE VNSL.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VNSL.COMPANY_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND VNSL.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT VNAP.SEQ , VNAP.VENDOR_CD , (VNAP.MOD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS MOD_DATE , VNAP.MOD_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(VNAP.GATE_CD, VNAP.MOD_USER_ID , #{ses.langCd}) AS MOD_USER_NM , VNAP.DEL_FLAG , VNAP.PAY_ACC_NM , VNAP.PAY_BANK , VNAP.PAY_ACCOUNT_NUM AS PAY_ACCOUNT_NUM , VNAP.PAY_ACCOUNT_USER_NM AS PAY_ACCOUNT_USER_NM , VNAP.PAY_ACC_MNG_NM AS PAY_ACC_MNG_NM , VNAP.PAY_ACC_NMG_TEL_NUM AS PAY_ACC_NMG_TEL_NUM , VNAP.PAY_ACC_MNG_EMAIL AS PAY_ACC_MNG_EMAIL , VNAP.ATT_FILE_NUM AS PAY_ATT_FILE_NUM , CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(VNAP.GATE_CD, VNAP.ATT_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(VNAP.GATE_CD, VNAP.ATT_FILE_NUM) END AS PAY_ATT_FILE_NUM_CNT FROM STOCVNAP VNAP WHERE VNAP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VNAP.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND VNAP.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT ATTD.GATE_CD , ATTD.TMPL_FILE_NM , ATTD.VALID_PERIOD , (ATTS.VALID_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_START_DATE , (ATTS.VALID_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_END_DATE , ATTD.REQUIRED_FLAG , GETCOMCODE(ATTD.GATE_CD, 'M044', ATTD.REQUIRED_FLAG, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS REQUIRED_FLAG_NM , ATTS.ATT_FILE_NUM AS ATTS_ATT_FILE_NUM , CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(ATTS.GATE_CD, ATTS.ATT_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(ATTS.GATE_CD, ATTS.ATT_FILE_NUM) END AS ATTS_ATT_FILE_NUM_CNT FROM STOCATTD ATTD LEFT JOIN STOCATTS ATTS ON (ATTS.GATE_CD = ATTD.GATE_CD AND ATTS.BUYER_CD = ATTD.BUYER_CD AND ATTS.DOC_TYPE = ATTD.DOC_TYPE AND ATTS.TMPL_NUM = ATTD.TMPL_NUM AND ATTS.TMPL_SQ = ATTD.TMPL_SQ AND ATTS.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND ATTs.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ATTD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ATTD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND ATTD.USE_FLAG = '1' AND ATTD.BUYER_CD IN ( SELECT #{ses.manageCd} FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT VNCM.BUYER_CD FROM STOCVNCM VNCM WHERE VNCM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VNCM.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND VNCM.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} ) AND ATTD.DOC_TYPE = 'D02' ORDER BY ATTD.BUYER_CD, ATTD.SORT_SQ

SELECT VNCM.BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(VNCM.GATE_CD, VNCM.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , VNCM.DEPT_CD , getDeptName(VNCM.GATE_CD, VNCM.BUYER_CD, VNCM.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM , VNCM.CONFIRM_FLAG , GETCOMCODE(VNCM.GATE_CD, 'M019', VNCM.CONFIRM_FLAG, '0', #{ses.langCd}) AS CONFIRM_FLAG_NM , (VNCM.CONFIRM_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CONFIRM_DATE , VNCM.CONFIRM_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(VNCM.GATE_CD, VNCM.CONFIRM_USER_ID , #{ses.langCd}) AS CONFIRM_USER_NM , VNCM.CONFIRM_REASON , VNCM.REQ_REASON FROM STOCVNCM VNCM WHERE VNCM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VNCM.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND VNCM.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD}
